name: agent-first-architecture
title: W2: Agent-First Architecture
description: The harness should delegate to specialized agents with proper context, not worktrees. Items: decompose as agents not worktrees, steps as agents, parallelize decomposition, /delegate skill, delegation with proper context, subagent delegation audit, Agent Teams integration.

assessment.rationale: Foundational architecture shift: new agent delegation subsystem touching commands, skills, subagent prompts, state management. 7 work items across multiple phases.
